## Git Stats
Commits (last 30 days): 364

Branches: 80
Latest tag: none

command_log.command: echo "## Git Stats" && echo "Commits (last 30 days): $(git log --since='30 days ago' --oneline | wc -l | tr -d ' ')" && echo "Contributors: $(git log --since='30 days ago' --format='%aN' | sort -u | wc -l | tr -d ' ')" && echo "Branches: $(git branch -a | wc -l | tr -d ' ')" && echo "Latest tag: $(git describe --tags --abbrev=0 2>/dev/null || echo 'none')"

command_log.command: echo "## Repo Structure" && echo "Top-level dirs:" && ls -d */ 2>/dev/null && echo "---" && echo "Total files: $(find . -type f -not -path './.git/*' -not -path './node_modules/*' | wc -l | tr -d ' ')" && echo "Total dirs: $(find . -type d -not -path './.git/*' -not -path './node_modules/*' | wc -l | tr -d ' ')"
echo "Workflow started. Hooks are now active."
